name: RABBIT-SPEC-BUG-4
title: contract.md names rabbit-feature-touch as sole consumer, violating process-agnostic principle
description: docs/spec/contract.md lines 27 and 32 explicitly name rabbit-feature-touch as the sole consumer ('Does NOT Invoke' and 'Consumed By' fields). spec.md Invariant 7 mandates the skill is process-agnostic (no assumption about callers), and test-skill-decoupled.py tests SKILL.md for this. contract.md is not tested for the same constraint. Fix: reword contract.md to use generic language ('any orchestrator') rather than naming a specific caller.
